message:
feat(mermaid): add quadrantChart parser, layout, and renderer

- Parse quadrantChart body: title, x-axis/y-axis with arrows, quadrant-N
  labels, and data points with [x, y] coordinates
- Add Statement variants: QuadrantTitle, QuadrantAxis, QuadrantLabel,
  QuadrantPoint with IR types IrQuadrantPoint, IrQuadrantAxis
- Layout: 2D scatter plot with axes and quadrant boundaries
- Render: Unicode/ASCII axes, quadrant labels, colored scatter points
- Update compatibility matrix: QuadrantChart -> Supported
- Update fixture tests with proper quadrant statement counting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -94,6 +94,11 @@ fn make_ir(
             guard: MermaidGuardReport::default(),
         },
         constraints: Vec::new(),
+        quadrant_points: Vec::new(),
+        quadrant_title: None,
+        quadrant_x_axis: None,
+        quadrant_y_axis: None,
+        quadrant_labels: [None, None, None, None],
     }
 }
